title: The Cyanist Empire
description: Official modpack for The Cyanist Empire server
body:
# About
This is a lightweight modpack built around Create and Farmer's Delight with a variety of environmental and aesthetic mods for added immersion, specifically made for use on our server, The Cyanist Empire.

## Please Note
- In the future we will be moving to NeoForge due to better support for Create for newer versions of Minecraft. Stay tuned on our Discord server for updates.

- This pack is designed for use on our server. It will work fine on singleplayer, however it does not include mods that run server-side only including world generation mods and server-side progression changes.

- Iris Shaders is currently unsupported due to mod conflicts. This is a known issue and will be resolved when Create Fabric updates to 1.21.

## Support and Feedback
If you need support, have a suggestion or want to keep updated on changes, [join our discord](https://discord.gg/bcssPkw) to chat with the community.
